Book proof demo
Home/Platform/Security & procurement

Procurement pack

Evidence your counsel can file. Without vendor lock-in.

Platform buyers ask for self-hosted receipts, fail-closed dispatch, export bundles, and shadow mode before production enforcement. This page consolidates what SourceA ships — educational framework maps only, not certification.

Book procurement walkthrough→ Try sourcea-boot >Verification
◇Self-hosted receiptsALLOW/BLOCK verdicts on your disk — durable for counsel and clients.
◇Fail-closed dispatchPolicy checked before every action. BLOCK stops the loop — no silent execution.
◇Export bundleWeekly HTML/PDF/replay script — what ran, what blocked, which policy version applied.
◇Shadow modeProve policy fires correctly before you enforce in production.

Tamper detection surfaces hash mismatch immediately — screen-share in under five minutes on verification.

Receipts logged — Logged and reviewable
Proof checks — Live sample · checks passing
